name: Baked Fish with Tomato-Orange Confit
recipeIngredient: 2 large Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
1 2/3 pounds Fish fillets Cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the dried tomatoes with boiling water and let sit until softened, about 20 minutes. Drain and chop.
2. In a medium pan heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic; saute for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the dried and fresh tomatoes, orange peel, orange and lime juices, tarragon, cayenne, and fennel seeds. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the orange sections, butter, pepper. Keep warm.
5. Place fish on a rack in a baking pan or use a broiling pan. Brush with 1 teaspoon olive oil.
6. Bake in a preheated 450-degree oven for 12 minutes per inch of thickness. Serve with confit on top.
